---
title: " "
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    df_print: paged
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="page-title">Contact</div>

<p class="contact-intro">Feel free to reach out! I'm always happy to connect about biotech, research, or new opportunities.</p>

<div class="contact-cards">
<a class="contact-card" id="email-card" href="#"><span class="contact-icon"><span class="icon-circle"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m2 7 10 6 10-6"/></svg></span></span><span class="contact-label">Email</span><span class="contact-detail" id="email-detail">Click to reveal</span></a>
<a class="contact-card" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lonnie-ernst-9a9a9b39" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="contact-icon"><span class="icon-circle"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/><rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/></svg></span></span><span class="contact-label">LinkedIn</span><span class="contact-detail">lonnie-ernst</span></a>
</div>

<div class="contact-availability">
<div class="contact-location">Based in Salt Lake City, Utah</div>
</div>

<script>
(function(){
  var user = "lonnie.ernst", domain = "proton.me";
  var card = document.getElementById("email-card");
  var detail = document.getElementById("email-detail");
  var revealed = false;
  card.addEventListener("click", function(e){
    if(!revealed){
      e.preventDefault();
      var addr = user + "@" + domain;
      detail.textContent = addr;
      card.href = "mailto:" + addr;
      revealed = true;
    }
  });
})();
</script>
